project_info.name: Cruise Terminal 5
project_info.owner: Tampa Port Authority d/b/a Port Tampa Bay

small.name: Port Canaveral Terminal 3 (The Launch Pad)
small.notes: Iconic identity (space theme) tied to regional context. Integrated garage + dedicated road infrastructure directly comparable to PTB requirements.

medium.name: PortMiami Terminal B (The Pearl of Miami, Norwegian)
medium.notes: Closest capacity comparison when scaled to PTB's 3,000-passenger target. Nautilus-inspired facade. Integrated parking with direct terminal access.

large.name: PortMiami Terminal F (Carnival)
large.notes: Executed while maintaining active port operations. Clear embark/debark circulation with continuous CBP coordination. Fast-track delivery model applicable to CMAR phasing.

subtypes.name: Cruise Terminal — Full Program with Garage

space_library.name: Main Entry Lobby / Check-In Hall
space_library.description: Open floor for kiosks, agent counters, queue lanes
space_library.adjacency_notes: Direct feed to Security Screening

space_library.name: Security Screening (TSA/CBP)
space_library.description: X-ray, body scanners, secondary screening; 4-6 lanes expandable to 8
space_library.adjacency_notes: Direct feed from Check-In; feeds Post-Security Holding

space_library.name: Post-Security Queuing / Holding
space_library.description: General seating, standing queue, wayfinding; 1,500-1,800 pax peak
space_library.adjacency_notes: Receives from Security; feeds Boarding Bridge; adjacent to VIP, Retail, Family

space_library.name: VIP / Loyalty Lounge
space_library.description: Premium seating, private check-in, concierge
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to Holding; separate entry path

space_library.name: Passenger Amenities (Retail / F&B)
space_library.description: Concessions, retail kiosks, vending; post-security revenue
space_library.adjacency_notes: Within post-security zone

space_library.name: Family / Accessible Waiting
space_library.description: Stroller staging, ADA-compliant seating
space_library.adjacency_notes: Near elevators and escalators

space_library.name: Boarding Bridge / Gangway Vestibule
space_library.description: Weather-protected connection to vessel; continuous sliding doors
space_library.adjacency_notes: Terminal endpoint of embarkation flow; waterside connection

space_library.name: Dedicated Debarkation Ramp
space_library.description: Vessel-to-FIS; physically separated from embark gangway
space_library.adjacency_notes: Waterside to FIS; fully separated from embarkation path

space_library.name: CBP Federal Inspection Service (FIS)
space_library.description: Primary + secondary inspection, APHIS, interview rooms; sealed zone
space_library.adjacency_notes: Receives from Debark Ramp; feeds Baggage Claim; adjacent to CBP Offices

process_sequence: CBP Primary Inspection (Global Entry kiosks + staffed double booths)
Baggage Claim (flat-bed devices with CBP inspection tables)

space_library.name: Baggage Claim Hall
space_library.description: Flat-bed claim devices, oversized luggage area, CBP inspection tables
space_library.adjacency_notes: Receives from FIS; feeds Meeter-Greeter

space_library.name: Post-CBP / Meeter-Greeter
space_library.description: Reunification area, ground transport info, clear exit wayfinding
space_library.adjacency_notes: Terminal endpoint of debarkation flow; connects to Curbside and Garage

space_library.name: Luggage Laydown — Embarkation
space_library.description: Drop-off staging, porter sorting, conveyor feed to vessel
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to Curbside; independent of passenger flow

space_library.name: Luggage Laydown — Debarkation
space_library.description: Vessel off-load staging, claim device feed
space_library.adjacency_notes: Feeds Baggage Claim Hall; waterside access

space_library.name: BHS Equipment Room
space_library.description: Conveyors, screening equipment, controls; expandable footprint
space_library.adjacency_notes: Central to Embark and Debark Laydown; expandable

space_library.name: Cart / Equipment Storage
space_library.description: Porter equipment, cart corrals
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to Embark Laydown

space_library.name: Passenger Elevators (4 ea.)
space_library.description: High-capacity, ADA-compliant; grouped at main core
space_library.adjacency_notes: Main core; serves all levels; near Family/Accessible Waiting

space_library.name: Escalators (4 pairs up/down)
space_library.description: At primary level transitions; visible from Holding
space_library.adjacency_notes: Visible from Holding area; primary level transitions

space_library.name: Monumental / Feature Stair
space_library.description: Architectural element at main lobby; wayfinding anchor
space_library.adjacency_notes: Main lobby focal point

space_library.name: Service Elevator(s)
space_library.description: Staff/freight; connects all levels; separate from public
space_library.adjacency_notes: Back-of-house; separate from public circulation

space_library.name: Egress Stairs (code-required)
space_library.description: Enclosed fire stairs per Florida Building Code
space_library.adjacency_notes: Per FBC requirements

space_library.name: Terminal Operations / Port Office
space_library.description: Shift supervisor, dispatch, CCTV monitoring
space_library.adjacency_notes: Central oversight; CCTV monitoring of all public areas

space_library.name: CBP / Federal Office Suite
space_library.description: Secure offices, break room, armory, interview rooms; direct FIS access
space_library.adjacency_notes: Direct access to FIS without passing through public areas

space_library.name: Cruise Line Operations Suite
space_library.description: Embark/debark ops, guest services, communications
space_library.adjacency_notes: Access to both embarkation and debarkation zones

space_library.name: Staff Break Room / Locker Area
space_library.description: Lockers, kitchenette, rest area
space_library.adjacency_notes: Back-of-house; accessible from all operations suites

space_library.name: Janitorial / Housekeeping
space_library.description: Slop sinks, chemical storage, supply closets
space_library.adjacency_notes: Distributed across levels; service corridor access

space_library.name: Loading Dock / Service Yard
space_library.description: Provisioning, waste removal, deliveries
space_library.adjacency_notes: Isolated from passenger areas; separate service access road

space_library.name: Main Electrical Room / Switchgear
space_library.description: Main service, transformers, emergency gen tie-in, shore power provisions
space_library.adjacency_notes: Above design flood elevation; shore power conduit provisions
space_library.resilience_notes: Must be above design flood elevation

space_library.name: HVAC Mechanical Room(s)
space_library.description: AHUs, chillers, pumps, controls; sized for peak cooling
space_library.adjacency_notes: Central distribution; oversized risers for expansion

strategies: HVLS fans in main holding hall
Thermal energy storage (ice or chilled water)

space_library.name: Fire Pump / Sprinkler Room
space_library.description: Fire pump, jockey pump, FDC
space_library.adjacency_notes: Ground level; fire department connection access

space_library.name: IT / Telecom / Security (MDF/IDF)
space_library.description: Server racks, network, PA, CCTV head-end; biometric systems
space_library.adjacency_notes: Above design flood elevation; integrated with FIS biometric systems
space_library.resilience_notes: Must be above design flood elevation

space_library.name: Emergency Generator Room
space_library.description: Diesel gen-set, fuel day tank, ATS
space_library.adjacency_notes: Above design flood elevation; sized for full FIS and life-safety
space_library.resilience_notes: Must be above design flood elevation; consider BESS supplement

space_library.name: Elevator Machine Rooms
space_library.description: Traction machines, controllers
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to elevator shafts

space_library.name: Public Restrooms (multi-location)
space_library.description: Men, women, family, ADA fixtures
space_library.adjacency_notes: Distributed across levels; near circulation cores

space_library.name: Nursing / Mother's Room
space_library.description: Private, lockable, sink, seating
space_library.adjacency_notes: Near Family Waiting and restrooms

space_library.name: Pet Relief Area
space_library.description: Service animals, interior/exterior turf area
space_library.adjacency_notes: Accessible from main circulation; exterior access preferred

space_library.name: Interfaith / Meditation Room
space_library.description: Quiet, non-denominational space
space_library.adjacency_notes: Away from high-traffic zones; quiet location

mechanical.thermal_storage: Ice or chilled water for peak demand shifting

energy.shore_power: Plan conduit and switchgear for future connection
energy.bess: Consider as supplement to diesel generation

resilience.flood_strategy: Vertical separation inherently elevates primary functions

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar along berth for passenger flow; hall-and-wing for large multi-berth terminals
